items.name: Cold Bee Bulb Abdomen
items.description:
With ordinary, lightbulb-esque abdomens like these, Bee Bulbs don't sting and are generally harmless. It's common to see folks with pet bee bulbs to provide warmth during the cold seasons as their light generate more heat than the average light bulb. Plus, they're really helpful if your power ever goes out.

Matching Head - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/85820645269928/Cold-Bee-Bulb

Matching Antennae - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/115682579748226/Cold-Bee-Bulb-Antennae

Yellow Variant - https://www.roblox.com/catalog/72088061273301/Bee-Bulb-Abdomen

https://www.roblox.com/groups/4360048/Jeggys-Barn

items.name: Geo Helmet
items.description:
Venture into the unknown with the Geo Helmet—crafted for explorers who dare to traverse the depths of oceans and the vastness of space. Its sleek, dark design exudes mystery while offering unparalleled protection. Whether you’re an underwater adventurer or an intergalactic astronaut, the Geo Helmet is your ultimate gear for conquering new frontiers.

More UGC! :
